description_long: This is a modern SMEG range hood with a sleek, angular design and a matte black finish. The hood features a wide, flared base that tapers upward into a rectangular chimney, giving it a bold and contemporary appearance. A subtle gold accent runs along the bottom edge, adding a touch of luxury to the otherwise minimalist aesthetic. The front face is smooth and unbroken except for the SMEG logo, while the sides are gently curved and the rear is flat for wall mounting. The venting system is likely integrated into the underside of the base, though no filters or control panels are visible. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and plastic, with a solid, durable build suitable for upscale urban kitchens.
description: A sleek, matte black SMEG range hood with a wide base, gold accent, and minimalist design, ideal for modern kitchens.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flared base, smooth face, and SMEG logo with gold accent at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the curved transition from base to chimney and the overall depth of the hood.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a flat back for wall mounting and the rectangular chimney structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the smooth, continuous curve and depth of the hood.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, gold SMEG logo is centered on the lower front face of the base.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are likely located on the underside of the base, not directly visible in the images.
